version_description: This is the complete album of Elton John & Brandi Carlile's "Who Believes in Angels?". Enjoy :).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

                                          "WHO BELIEVES IN ANGELS?"

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Released: April 4, 2025
Genre: Rock

Track listing:
01.THE ROSE OF LAURA NYRO
02.LITTLE RICHARD'S BIBLE
03.SWING FOR THE FENCES
04.NEVER TOO LATE
05.YOU WITHOUT ME
06.WHO BELIEVES IN ANGELS?
07.THE RIVER MAN
08.A LITTLE LIGHT
09.SOMEONE TO BELONG TO
10.WHEN THIS OLD WORLD IS DONE WITH ME
